interpreted_controls.control_objective: To establish authorised procedures for all applicable Cyber Security requirements relating to 'Cyber Security Governance', thereby enabling CIC to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Cyber Risk exposure.
interpreted_controls.control_scope: Applicable entities: CIC. Responsible departments: IT, Cyber Security. Regulatory domain: Cyber Security.
interpreted_controls.automation_rationale: Technical controls produce machine-readable system state that can be queried through automated scripts.
interpreted_controls.business_rationale: Financial institutions are prime targets for cyber attacks. Without robust cyber controls, the bank faces operational disruption, customer data breaches, and potential regulatory sanctions including licence revocation. Implementing 'Cyber Security Governance' reduces the attack surface and demonstrates security maturity to regulators and customers alike.
interpreted_controls.control_summary: [LOW] Cyber Security Governance — Authorisation Control is a technical control supporting the 'Cyber Security Governance' business capability. Implementation follows the 'System Deployment' pattern and is owned by the IT function. Compliance is verified through powershell.

interpreted_controls.control_objective: To prevent all applicable Outsourcing requirements relating to 'Vendor & Outsourcing Governance', thereby enabling CIC to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Legal Risk exposure.
interpreted_controls.control_scope: Applicable entities: CIC. Responsible departments: Compliance, Risk, Legal. Regulatory domain: Outsourcing, Customer Protection.
interpreted_controls.automation_rationale: Prohibition enforcement can leverage automated system guardrails, but exception handling and investigation require human review.
interpreted_controls.business_rationale: Third-party failures can directly impact the institution's own regulatory obligations. 'Vendor & Outsourcing Governance' ensures that vendors and outsourced service providers are subject to appropriate due diligence, contractual safeguards, and ongoing monitoring, preventing operational and reputational failures from propagating through the supply chain.
interpreted_controls.control_summary: [HIGH] Vendor & Outsourcing Governance — Restriction Control is a preventive control supporting the 'Vendor & Outsourcing Governance' business capability. Implementation follows the 'Policy Update' pattern and is owned by the Compliance function. Compliance is verified through manual audit.
